purpose: Tier-1 trigger eval: does a query activate `tech-lead` (orchestrate the whole feature end-to-end)? Hardest negatives are requests for a SINGLE harness step, which should route to that one sub-skill, not the orchestrator.

cases.query: run the full harness on this pitch
act as tech lead and ship this feature end to end
orchestrate the build from pitch to ship
plan, build, and evaluate this feature for me
drive this feature through the whole SDLC loop, pausing at the gates
only evaluate TASK-004 against the spec
shape this idea before anything else
hunt edge cases on the running app
what is the capital of Australia
